title: ENOTEMPTY rmdir generated output
rationale: ENOTEMPTY is a user-environment errno (directory not empty during rmdir of generated output); added to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS.
fixSummary: Add ENOTEMPTY to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS in resolveErrorCode.
problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOTEMPTY during generated-output cleanup surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.
